mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(UM.NAME, '') AS NAME /* 추천인 */ , URM.REFERRER_PHONE AS PHONE /* 추천인 전번*/ , COUNT(R2.USER_ID) AS REFERRAL_COUNT /* 추천받은 카운트 */ FROM user_referral_mst URM LEFT JOIN user_mst UM ON URM.REFERRER_USER_ID = UM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN user_referral_mst R2 ON R2.REFERRAL_ID = #{userId} WHERE URM.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY UM.NAME , URM.REFERRER_PHONE
